task_completion.description: Open the review memo to read the instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/acls_review_memo.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the original ACLS lecture presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A presentation software (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) is open displaying ACLS_lecture.pptx.

task_completion.description: Delete the 3 contaminating PALS slides from the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnails pane shows that the slides titled 'PALS Overview: Pediatric BLS Differences', 'Pediatric Drug Dosing: Weight-Based Epinephrine', and 'PALS Algorithms: Pediatric Shockable Rhythms' have been removed. The total slide count should decrease from 22 to 19.

task_completion.description: Save the modified presentation as ACLS_corrected.pptx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'ACLS_corrected.pptx' in the Documents folder, or the presentation window title updated to 'ACLS_corrected.pptx'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original presentation remains unmodified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'Save As' instead of 'Save' when editing the original file, or a file manager window shows both 'ACLS_lecture.pptx' and 'ACLS_corrected.pptx' coexisting in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI presentation editor to modify the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Impress or a similar GUI application, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to manipulate the PPTX file.

integrity.description: The agent actually deleted the slides in the editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The slide pane in the presentation software reflects the missing slides, rather than the agent just renaming the file without editing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original presentation has 22 slides. The 3 PALS slides to be removed are at original positions 5 ('PALS Overview: Pediatric BLS Differences'), 12 ('Pediatric Drug Dosing: Weight-Based Epinephrine'), and 19 ('PALS Algorithms: Pediatric Shockable Rhythms'). The expected corrected slide count is exactly 19. Note: The task requires removing ONLY the PALS slides. The agent should NOT delete or alter valid adult slides (such as original Slide 6 containing 'not weight-based' or Slide 7 containing '1.5 mg/kg') even if they share similar keywords.
